nav.announcement: Check out our latest blog post

hero.badgeLocation: Pediatric Dentistry · Grayslake & Lake County, IL
hero.tagline: High-quality pediatric and children's dental care that kids actually look forward to — serving families throughout Lake County.
hero.trustBanner: Serving Lake County for Over 30 Years · Est. 1994

services.heading: Our Services
services.body: From routine check-ups to specialized treatments, we provide comprehensive, compassionate dental care designed specifically for children.

preventive.title: Preventive Dentistry
preventive.description: Regular check-ups, cleanings, and fluoride treatments to keep your child's smile healthy and stop problems before they start.

restorative.title: Restorative Dentistry
restorative.description: Expert, gentle treatment for cavities and broken teeth to restore healthy smiles using child-friendly techniques.

sedation.title: Sedation Dentistry
sedation.description: Gentle sedation options for nervous kids and more complex procedures, including nitrous oxide and general anesthesia.

specialNeeds.title: Special Needs Dentistry
specialNeeds.description: Compassionate, specialized care for children with diverse needs — including autism, Down syndrome, ADHD, and sensory differences.

emergency.title: Emergency Pediatric Dentist
emergency.description: When your child has a toothache, knocked-out tooth, or dental injury, we'll get them in as soon as possible.

insurance.heading: In-Network with Most Major PPOs
insurance.body: We accept most major dental insurance plans to make care affordable for your family.
insurance.footerLink: Text/Call us — we likely accept it.

doctors.heading: Meet Our Doctors
doctors.body: Four pediatric specialists who genuinely love what they do. Get to know the team your family will see at every visit.

valueProps.heading: A Practice Built Around Your Child
valueProps.body: We designed every part of our practice, from our schedule to our bedside manner with young patients and their parents in mind.

experts.title: Specialized pediatric experts
experts.body: All four of our board-certified doctors focus exclusively on pediatric dentistry — care designed specifically for little mouths and big feelings.

environment.title: Child-friendly environment
environment.body: Our office is designed to delight and comfort kids at every turn — from colorful spaces to gentle voices that make every dental visit something to look forward to.

comms.title: Parent-centered communication
comms.body: Transparent treatment plans, plain-language explanations, and zero judgment. You'll always know exactly what's happening with your child's smile.

floating.ariaAppointment: Request an appointment at Kids Dentist Grayslake

footer.tagline: Caring for kids' smiles in Grayslake since day one.
